data.title: illumynt, a CNE Direct company, promotes Jörg Herbarth to CEO. He aims to lead the company to become the top AI- focused ITAD provider globally.
data.description: In Burlington, Massachusetts, illumynt, a CNE Direct subsidiary, has promoted Jörg Herbarth to Chief Executive Officer (CEO). Jörg, who has been with illumynt since June 2022, previously held the position of Chief Operating Officer and is now leading the company towards becoming the leading provider of AI- and data-centric IT Asset Disposition (ITAD) solutions globally. This promotion signifies Jörg's growing role within the company's executive team.

data.title: AAR Corp. (NYSE: AIR) earnings expected to be $1.00/share, revenue $692.45 million. Shares fell 1.3% to $74.76. AAR subsidiary signs deal with Cebu Pacific.
data.description: AAR Corp (AIR) is set to announce its first-quarter earnings after the market closes on Tuesday, Sept. 23. Analysts predict earnings per share to reach $1.00, up from 85 cents a year earlier. Revenue for the quarter is expected to be $692.45 million, compared to $661.7 million in the previous year. The company's subsidiary, Airinmar, has recently extended support services with Cebu Pacific, a low-cost carrier in the Philippines. Closing at $74.76, AAR's shares dropped by 1.3% on Wednesday. For those interested, the latest analyst ratings are available on the Analyst Stock Ratings page of Benzinga.

data.title: Fed cuts rates by 25 basis points, Goldman Sachs predicts more cuts in October & December, aiming for 3.00%–3.25% in 2026.
data.description: Goldman Sachs predicts that the recent 25-basis-point rate cut by the Federal Reserve is just the beginning of a series of reductions, with expectations of additional cuts in October and December. Chief U.S. economist David Mericle suggested that if the labor market weakens, a 50-basis-point cut is also possible. These cuts could potentially bring interest rates down to 3.00%–3.25% by the end of 2026. The move towards easing is in response to shifting economic risks from inflation to employment. The Federal Reserve's updated Summary of Economic Projections indicates a median forecast for three rate cuts this year, hinting at a more aggressive easing stance than initially anticipated by Goldman Sachs.

data.title: WRISE and Foley & Lardner LLP host AmyK Hutchens on Sep 24th for a presentation "Communicate to Connect" in San Diego, CA. Event free for renewables professionals.
data.description: A motivating networking opportunity is scheduled for Wednesday, September 24th, starting at 6:00pm and concluding at 7:30pm. The event will be held at Foley & Lardner, located at 11988 El Camino Real Suite 400 in San Diego, CA 92130. All professionals working in the renewables industry are invited to attend. Admission tickets and parking are provided at no cost. Limited space is available, so early registration is recommended.

data.title: 2025 Chery International User Summit in WUHU, China will be held from Oct 17-21, celebrating future mobility.
data.description: In WUHU, China, on September 18, 2025, an annual celebration of future mobility is set to take place from October 17 to 21, 2025. This event will showcase the fusion of speed and collaboration, along with the integration of cutting-edge technology in a warm ecosystem.

data.title: 11 organizations request US Army Corps to fund Aquatic Plant Control program for FY 2025. Urgent need for $5 million.
data.description: 11 notable American aquatic plant management science organizations recently conveyed their significant apprehensions regarding the lack of funding for the Aquatic Plant Control program for Fiscal Year 2025 in a correspondence addressed to the leaders of the US Army Corps of Engineers. The letter, sent from Westminster, Colorado on September 18, 2025, emphasized the urgent need for financial support for the program.

data.title: Incredibuild introduces AI platform for software development, boosting speed and intelligence. #AI #tech #Incredibuild
data.description: A groundbreaking platform has been introduced in New York on September 18, 2025, by Incredibuild, a renowned leader in build acceleration. This innovative platform provides customers with real-time build intelligence to enhance and quicken AI-driven product development processes. Marking a significant milestone in technology, this first-of-its-kind platform aims to empower users by leveraging up-to-date insights for efficient development.

data.title: Casio America's General Manager of Education Technology, Jim Gross, retires after 28 years of leadership.
data.description: After spearheading Casio's calculator innovations, fostering teacher partnerships, and driving digital learning initiatives in the U.S for 28 years, Jim Gross is set to retire at the end of September. The announcement was made by Casio America, Inc. today, with the retirement effective as of September 30, 2025. Gross has been instrumental in advancing these areas during his tenure with the company, leaving behind a legacy that has significantly impacted the industry.

data.title: Inventor from Texas City develops FRUIT & VEGETABLE WASHER to clean produce before consumption.
data.description: A resident of Texas City, Texas recently introduced a new invention aimed at providing a convenient way for people to clean fresh produce before consumption. The innovator, hailing from Texas, created the FRUIT & VEGETABLE WASHER with the intention of offering individuals a simple method to wash fruits and vegetables. Released on September 18, 2025, the product came about with the vision of facilitating quick cleaning of produce. This invention represents a potential solution to enhance food safety and hygiene practices, catering to the health-conscious population. The debut of the FRUIT & VEGETABLE WASHER brings forth a promising solution for ensuring clean and fresh fruits and vegetables are consumed.

data.title: Electric Vehicle Transmission Market to reach $30.8 billion by 2033, with 10.5% CAGR growth driven by growing adoption of EVs globally.
data.description: The Electric Vehicle Transmission Market is witnessing significant growth due to increasing popularity of battery electric vehicles, hybrid electric vehicles, and plug-in hybrid models in the automotive industry worldwide. The market is driven by government incentives and strict emission regulations, leading to a surge in demand. This growth trend is reflected in a notable increase in sales and production numbers of electric vehicles, which have been steadily climbing in recent years.

data.title: STEERBRIDGE enhances operations with Unanet ERP to boost federal mission delivery efficiency.
data.description: A GovCon company based in Dulles, Virginia, Unanet, specializing in project-based productivity and growth solutions for the government contracting sector, revealed on September 18, 2025, that STEERBRIDGE has chosen Unanet to streamline its operations. This move is part of the mission-driven approach of Unanet, aimed at facilitating scalable growth within the industry.
